name: Pagination
description: Pagination breaks a large dataset into pages an operator can move through — the standard way to navigate the thousands of vehicles, trips, and alerts in the portal's data tables.
keyRule: Desktop tables paginate — they don't infinite-scroll. For large or server-driven data, fetch one page at a time rather than loading everything.

variants.name: Table footer (range + prev/next)
variants.whenToUse: Default for data tables; compact, shows totals.

variants.name: Numbered pages
variants.whenToUse: When operators jump around (page 1, 2, 3…); good for moderate counts.

variants.name: Rows-per-page only
variants.whenToUse: When the dataset fits a couple of pages.

anatomy.name: Range label
anatomy.description: the visible window and total ("1–100 of 100,000").

anatomy.name: Previous / next
anatomy.description: step one page at a time.

anatomy.name: Page numbers
anatomy.description: optional direct jumps with the current page highlighted.

behaviors.name: Server vs client
behaviors.description: For small sets, paginate in the browser; for large/remote data, request each page from the server and show a loading state while fetching.

behaviors.name: Selection across pages
behaviors.description: When rows are selected, keep the selection as the operator pages (and make it clear how many are selected in total).

behaviors.name: Resetting
behaviors.description: Changing filters or page size resets to page one; preserve sort.

props.name: totalItems
props.description: Total row count across all pages, used to build the range label ("1–100 of 100,000").

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Page-size choices offered in the rows-per-page control (e.g. 25/50/100).

props.name: variant
props.description: Table footer (range + prev/next), Numbered pages, or Rows-per-page only, per the spec's Variants table.

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: How many page-number buttons to show around the current page (numbered variant).

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Called when the operator moves to a different page (previous/next or a numbered jump).

props.name: onPageSizeChange
props.description: Called when the operator changes rows-per-page; should reset to page one per the Resetting behavior.

props.name: className
props.description: Optional extra class names to compose with the base pgn class.

doThis: Show the total and current range.
Fetch per page for large data.
dontDoThis: Don't infinite-scroll a desktop data table.
Don't lose selection or sort when paging.
Don't load 100k rows into the browser at once.
accessibility: Pagination is a labelled navigation region.
The current page exposes aria-current, and prev/next convey their disabled state.
Controls are keyboard operable with visible focus.

related.name: DataTable
related.why: Its host — pagination never appears alone

related.name: ProgressIndicator
related.why: Show a linear indicator while a page loads
